themes.exampleQuote: A little bit of Paris in Pittsburgh.
The seasonal La Ruche might be the best dessert I have ever had.
You can call ahead if you know what you want. It is busy on weekends.
This place was the find of Pittsburgh. Breakfast and lunch!
Nut and chocolate croissants that were all fantastic, and a cream puff that was delicious.

notable_quote: The seasonal La Ruche from La Gourmandine might be the best dessert I have ever had.
sentiment_summary: Reviewers keep coming back to the Frenchness of it, specifically the laminated doughs and seasonal specials, while the only friction is weekend crowding and occasional uncertainty about whether specific items are still on the menu.
quarter_narrative: Nine creators filmed La Gourmandine in Lawrenceville this quarter and the bakery posted nothing back. Thirty-one thousand TikTok plays moved through the neighborhood and the business's own Instagram sat quiet for more than forty days, a gap that is increasingly hard to explain given 1,294 Google reviews and a conversion path that is fully built out. Across the Pittsburgh Sweets family, Page's holds the social momentum signal; La Gourmandine holds the review depth, the visual catalog, and the creator attention, but none of that translates to rank movement until the feed restarts. The climb from Ones to Watch into Icons territory is already funded by the city's attention; it is waiting on the business to collect it.
tldr_read: Nearly 1,300 reviews, nine creators filming, Instagram dormant for over forty days. Ones to Watch, number one in Pittsburgh Bakeries.
tldr_meaning: The review and creator signals are strong enough to push this into Icons; the Instagram silence is the only axis pulling the composite down.

diagnosis_pullquote.line: First In Pittsburgh Bakeries, Carried By 1,294 Reviews. The Feed Has Gone Quiet.

playbook.headline: Restart Instagram before another week passes
playbook.action: The account has been dark for 41 days; one post per week featuring a named seasonal item closes the gap against the family median.

playbook.headline: Tag creators already filming the bakery
playbook.action: Nine creators produced 31,960 TikTok plays this quarter; acknowledging them on Instagram converts existing reach into follower growth at no cost.

playbook.headline: Surface seasonal menu items explicitly online
playbook.action: One reviewer is asking publicly about the délice de pistache; a pinned Google post or bio update confirming current specials removes friction at the point of search.
